properties.description: GNOME is a popular Linux desktop environment shown in Activities overview mode with a dark panel-free desktop, bottom dock, and open application windows.
The GNOME Activities Overview is triggered to show open windows and a search bar at the top center of the screen, used for app launching and window switching.
A dock at the bottom of the GNOME Activities overview showing pinned application icons including a browser, file manager, notes, calculator, and app grid button.
Nautilus (GNOME Files) is the default file manager for GNOME, shown open with a folder grid view and sidebar for places navigation.
